person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
armoirie de la famille des Baux (del Balzo) :
De gueules à l'étoile à seize rais d'argent.
relevé JPR Teyssier Chalancon Mangas
Bertrand III of Baux (also known as Bertrando Del Balzo) was the 3rd Count of Andria and Squillace, and the 9th Lord of Baux. He was born in August 1295 at Andria, Italy to Raymond de Baux and Alice de Marseilles and married Margerite d'Aulnay in c.1324. He died on 15 September 1347 in Naples, Italy and was buried at San Domenico Maggiore.


Bertrand III of Baux (also known as Bertrando Del Balzo), Count of Andria, Montescaglioso, and Squillace, Lord of Berre, Senator of Rome, Captain-General of Tuscany, and Justiciar of Naples, was born in August 1295 at Andria, Italy to Bertrand II of Baux and Berengaria of Andria. He married, as his first wife, Beatrice of Anjou, daughter of King Charles II of Naples, in 1309; she died c. 1321. His daughter was:
•	Marie, who married Humbert II of Viennois
He married a second time to Marguerite d'Aulnay in about 1324. Their son was:
•	Francis of Baux, Duke of Andria, Count of Montescaglioso and Squillace, and Lord of Berre, Mison, and Tiano. He had three wives: Luisa de San Severino, Margaret of Taranto and Sueva Orsini.
He died on 15 September 1347 in Naples, Italy and was buried at San Domenico Maggiore.

sourceList.title: Bertrand III del Balzo, "Find A Grave Index"

zh.lifeSummary: 當Conte di Andria e di Montescaglioso Bertrand III des Baux於1295年8月出生在義大利普格利亞巴里安德里亞時，他的父親Bertrand II des Baux50歲，母親Bérangère d’Andria40歲。他於1309年與Béatrix d’Anjou結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1347年9月15日在勒尼 迪 拿坡里拿坡里享年52歲，埋葬在義大利坎帕尼亞拿坡里拿坡里。

nameMeanings.name: des
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Indian: variant of   Deo  . In Maharashtra, Konkanastha Brahmins have a clan called Dev.

variants.name: Deo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ravindra, Sohini, Vivek, Ajay, Alok, Anil, Annapurna, Daya, Ganga, Goutam, Harnek, Indra.

Indian (northern states): from Sanskrit deva ‘deity, lord’. This was a title used by ruling families in northern India. There is a Jat tribe called Deo. In northeastern India this name is spelled and pronounced Deb . Elsewhere, a common variant is Dev .
Italian: from a short form of the personal names Amadeo, Laudadeo, or Sperindeo, of which only the first now remains in use as a personal name.

nameMeanings.name: Baux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Hauck
meanings: German: from a dialect variant of the ancient Germanic personal name Hugo (see Hugh ). Compare Haug .

variants.name: Houx
meanings: French (northern) and Walloon: topographic name from French houx ‘holly’, or a habitational name from any of the places called with this word, for example in Eure-et-Loir (France) and in the province of Namur in Belgium (Wallonia).
German: rare northern variant of   Haux   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: Bertrand
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval French variant of   Bertram  , imported to Britain by the Normans. In modern times it has been made famous by the English philosopher  Bertrand Russell  (  1872–1970 ), but is only in occasional use.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Conte di Andria e di Montescaglioso Bertrand III des Baux was born in August 1295, in Andria, Bari, Puglia, Italy, his father, Bertrand II des Baux, was 50 and his mother, Bérangère d’Andria, was 40. He married Béatrix d’Anjou in 1309. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died on 15 September 1347, in Naples, Kingdom of Naples, at the age of 52, and was buried in Naples, Naples, Campania, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Conte di Andria e di Montescaglioso Bertrand III des Baux est né en août 1295, à Andria, Bari, Puglia, Italie, son père, Bertrand II des Baux, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Bérangère d’Andria, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Béatrix d’Anjou en 1309. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 15 septembre 1347, à Napoli, Regno di Napoli, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Napoli, Napoli, Campania, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Conte di Andria e di Montescaglioso Bertrand III des Baux im August 1295 in Andria, Bari, Puglia, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bertrand II des Baux 50 und seine Mutter Bérangère d’Andria 40. Er hat 1309 Béatrix d’Anjou geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 15. September 1347 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Neapel, Neapel und wurde in Neapel, Napoli, Campania, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Conte di Andria e di Montescaglioso Bertrand III des Baux è nato il nel agosto 1295 nel Andria, Bari, Puglia, Italia, il suo padre, Bertrand II des Baux, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Bérangère d’Andria, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Béatrix d’Anjou nel 1309. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 15 settembre 1347, nel Napoli, Regno di Napoli, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Napoli, Napoli, Campania, Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Conte di Andria e di Montescaglioso Bertrand III des Bauxが1295年8月にイタリアプウグリアバーイアンドリアで生まれた時，父Bertrand II des Bauxは50歳，母Bérangère d’Andriaは40歳であった。1309年にBéatrix d’Anjouと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1347年9月15日にレグノ ジー ナポリナポリで52歳で死去し，イタリアカンプアニアナポリナポリにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Conte di Andria e di Montescaglioso Bertrand III des Baux(이)가 1295년 8월 이탈리아 푸그리야 버리 앤드리아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bertrand II des Baux(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Bérangère d’Andria(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1309년 Béatrix d’Anjou(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1347년 9월 15일 레뇰 디 나폴리 나폴리에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 캠파니아 나폴리 나폴리에 묻혔다.

mn.August 1295–15 September 1347: 1295 оны Наймдугаар сар–1347 оны Есдүгээр сарын 15

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Conte di Andria e di Montescaglioso Bertrand III des Baux nasceu em agosto de 1295, em Andria, Bari, Puglia, Itália, seu pai, Bertrand II des Baux, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Bérangère d’Andria, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Béatrix d’Anjou em 1309. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de setembro de 1347, em Napoli, Regno di Napoli, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Napoli, Napoli, Campania, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Conte di Andria e di Montescaglioso Bertrand III des Baux родился август 1295 г. в местности андря, бари, пугля, Италия, его отцу по имени Bertrand II des Baux было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Bérangère d’Andria, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Béatrix d’Anjou в 1309 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер 15 сентября 1347 г. в местности наполи, регно ди наполи в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности наполи, наполи, кампаня, Италия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Conte di Andria e di Montescaglioso Bertrand III des Baux nació en agosto de 1295, en Andria, Bari, Puglia, Italia, su papá, Bertrand II des Baux, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Bérangère d’Andria, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Béatrix d’Anjou en 1309. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 15 de septiembre de 1347, en Napoli, Regno di Napoli, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Napoli, Napoli, Campania, Italia.
